summary: AiForge backend + mobile UI tested end-to-end. Backend: 23/23 functional pass (24 tests, 1 was a test-side casing bug now fixed). All auth (register/login/me/google-reject), plans (5 tiers verified), generation (image via Nano Banana, model3d via Nano Banana isometric, chat via Claude, SCAD via Claude, video kickoff returns status=processing), creations CRUD, daily-limit enforcement (free=5/day -> 6th returns 402), and Stripe checkout creation all work with real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and STRIPE_API_KEY. Frontend: login screen renders with AiForge cyberpunk branding, gradient SIGN IN button, Google OAuth button. Login flow works (POST /api/auth/login -> 200, token saved, redirected to /(tabs)). Home tab renders welcome, usage meter (0/5), 3 category cards, recent creations empty state, and 5-tab bottom nav (Home/Create/Library/Plans/Profile). testIDs present on login fields and submit. Two non-blocking issues: (1) excessive client-side polling of /api/auth/me, /api/creations, /api/creations/stats (dozens of repeats while idle on home tab) — likely useFocusEffect or setInterval rerun; needs throttle. (2) Console deprecation warnings: shadow* style props (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents).

integration_issues.issue: Excessive polling: /api/auth/me, /api/creations, /api/creations/stats are each called many times while sitting idle on the home tab (observed >30 calls each in ~15s). Likely a useEffect/useFocusEffect dependency loop or an unthrottled interval. Adds backend load and battery drain on real devices.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Multiple components use legacy RN shadow* props that are deprecated on web/RN-newer. Reference: search StyleSheet.create usages across /app/frontend/app and /app/frontend/src.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Move pointerEvents prop into style object.

action_items: Throttle/dedupe refresh in AuthContext + home tab so /api/auth/me, /api/creations, /api/creations/stats are not called on every render. Replace any setInterval polling with a single focus-effect or SWR-style cache with a sensible TTL (e.g., 30s).
Replace deprecated RN style props: convert shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to boxShadow (or guard for native vs web), and move pointerEvents prop into style.

Optional: add testIDs to bottom tabs (tab-home, tab-create, tab-library, tab-plans, tab-profile) and to inner home elements (usage-meter, category-image, category-video, category-model3d) to make future UI tests deterministic.
Optional code review: server.py is ~630 lines — still manageable but consider splitting routers (auth.py, generate.py, creations.py, payments.py) before it grows further.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: emails are correctly lowercased on insert/login — good.
server.py: MongoDB _id is excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on all reads — good.
server.py: daily usage stored in usage collection per (user_id, day) with unique index and $inc — clean and race-safe.
server.py: video generation correctly runs in BackgroundTasks via run_in_executor and persists status updates — non-blocking, good.
server.py: /api/checkout/create properly uses origin_url from request body and emergentintegrations Stripe wrapper — no hardcoded URLs.
Auth: JWT uses 7-day expiry with HS256 + env JWT_SECRET — acceptable for MVP.
Auth: /api/auth/google correctly returns 401 on invalid Emergent session_id (verified).
seed_data_creation: Tests register transient TEST_<uuid>@example.com users to avoid colliding with seeded demo user; demo@example.com/demo1234 used only for read-only flows and Stripe checkout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green (all 24 pytest cases pass after the email-casing fix). Frontend login + home are verified visually with screenshots; deeper screen-by-screen tests of Create / Library / Plans / Profile bottom tabs were not exercised in this iteration due to time — recommend a follow-up Playwright run that taps each bottom tab and verifies type selector + duration picker on Create, filters on Library, all 5 plan cards + upgrade button on Plans, and logout on Profile. The only behavioral concern is excessive idle polling described above.
rca_of_issue: Polling RCA hypothesis: AuthContext likely re-fetches /api/auth/me on every state change, and home/(tabs)/index.tsx likely reloads /api/creations and /api/creations/stats inside a useEffect whose dependencies change on every render (e.g., new object/array literal). Mitigation: memoize callbacks with useCallback, stable deps, and add a 30s in-memory cache.
